title: Abu'l-Fadl Harawi
body: Abu'l-Fadl Harawi (Persian: ابو الفضل هروى) (also called Abu al-Fadl al-Harawi, Abufadlus Harwanensis) was a 10th-century astronomer who, along with al-Khujandi, studied under the patronage of the Buyid dynasty in Ray, Iran. The nisba "Harawi" suggests that he was originally from Herat, in ancient times also known as Haraiva.
categories: Astronomers of the medieval Islamic world
